  2. Cards
  3. Credit Cards
  4. PhonePe HDFC Bank Ultimo Credit Card

PhonePe HDFC Bank Ultimo Credit Card

  • Get 10% Reward Points on select PhonePe Categories Spends.

     

  • Get 5% Reward Points on select online brands Spends.

     

  • Get 1% Reward Points on UPI Scan & Pay.

What's in store for you

  • Card Benefits & Features
  • Card Management & Controls
  • Frequently Asked Questions

More benefits than ever before

Welcome Benefits

  • Get PhonePe Gift card ?499 on your first Rupay CC on UPI transaction.

  • Additional Scratch cards worth ?50 each on your next 10 Rupay CC on UPI transactions..

  • Disclaimer - Welcome benefits will be offered only to cardholders for whom Joining Fee is applicable

Key Features

  • Earn up to 2000 Reward Points per month on your everyday spends like utilities, bill payments, flights, hotels, online shopping brands, UPI Scan & Pay and much more.

Travel Benefits

  • Enjoy 8 complimentary domestic airport lounge visits every year (2 per quarter)*

Fuel Surcharge Waiver

  • Save 1% on fuel surcharge at fuel stations when you pay with your card.

View More

Key Features

Welcome Benefits

  • Get PhonePe Gift card ?499 on your first Rupay CC on UPI transaction (Minimum transaction of ? 100).
  • Additional Scratch cards worth ?50 each on your next 10 Rupay CC on UPI transactions (Minimum transaction of ?100).
  • Disclaimer - Welcome benefits will be offered only to cardholders for whom Joining Fee is applicable.

Reward Point Benefits

  • 10% Reward Points on Select PhonePe categories* (Recharges, Utilities, Bill Payments and Travel) - Capped at 1000 Reward Points per calendar month.
  • 5% Reward Points on Select Online Brands – Amazon, Flipkart, Myntra, Ajio, Swiggy, Zomato, Uber (Capped at 500 Reward Points per calendar month).
  • 1% Reward Points on All Scan & Pay spends (Capped at 500 Reward Points per calendar month).
  • Reward Points TnCs
  • Reward points are posted once every month for eligible transactions settled in the previous calendar month. For example, reward points for eligible transactions settled between 1-Nov to 30-Nov (as per posting date), will be credited to the card account on or before 15th Dec.
  • *The Rewards on PhonePe PINCODE will be valid until 5th Dec’25.

Travel Benefits

  • 8 complimentary annual domestic lounge access, 2 per quarter (Conditional - Spend Rs 75,000 in a quarter to be eligibile for the lounge access).
  • Click here for Lounge Benefits FAQ
View More

Fuel Surcharge Waiver

  • 1% fuel surcharge waived of on fuel transactions.?(Minimum transaction of ?400 & maximum transaction of ?5,000. Maximum waiver of ?250 per statement cycle).

Wondering if you are eligible?

Salaried

  • Age: Minimum 21 years to maximum 60 years.
  • Income: Gross Monthly Income> ?25,000.

Self-employed

  • Age: Minimum 21 years to maximum 65 years.
  • Income: ?26 lakh per annum.

Save up to ?15,000 * annually

Apply Now

Documents required to get you started

Identity Proof

  • Passport
  • Aadhaar card
  • Voter ID
  • Driving licence
  • PAN card
  • Passport size photograph

Address Proof

  • Utility bills (electricity, water, gas, or telephone)
  • Rental agreement
  • Passport
  • Aadhaar card
  • Voter ID

Income Proof

  • Salary slips (for salaried individuals)
  • Income Tax Returns (ITR)
  • Form 16
  • Bank statements

Apply Now in 3 Easy Steps:

Online application process:

  • Step 1 - Provide & validate your Phone Number & Date of Birth/PAN
  • Step 2- Confirm your details
  • Step 3- Select your Card
  • Step 4- Submit & Receive your Card*

*In certain cases, uploading documents and completing video KYC might be required.

Check Eligibility

Know more about the card

  1. Card Control via MyCards

  2. How to Apply

  3. Fees & Charges

  4. Credit Card Activation

  5. Reward Points Redemption & Validity

  6. Additional Features

  7. Most Important Terms and Conditions

Card Control via MyCards

Manage your Credit Card - Visit Mycards.hdfcbank.com. Log in with your Registered Mobile No and OTP to manage your PhonePe HDFC Bank Ultimo Credit Card-

  • Card Controls to set daily limits, domestic/ international usage, online spends limit, etc.
  • Statement Request to generate monthly/ yearly Credit Card statements.
  • PIN Setting for Credit Card usage.
  • SmartEMI to convert transactions/ outstanding balance to EMI.
  • BillPay to automate Bill payments like electricity, mobile, broadband etc
  • Service Requests for any card hot listing, issuing new Credit Cards etc
  • Card Offers for any specific offers on this Credit Card.
  • Block your Credit Card.

How To Apply

Steps to Apply:

Login to the PhonePe APP.
Look for PhonePe HDFC Credit card banner in the APP.
Start application by filling in the details.

Note: You can apply only through the PhonePe App. There is no offline or web-based application process.

Eligibility Criteria –
Nationality: Indian
Age: 21 to 65 years

Disclaimer - The final application decision, variant (Ultimo or Uno) & credit limit will be subject to Bank's internal policies.

Fees & Charges

Joining Fee: ?999 + applicable taxes

Annual Fee: ?999 + applicable taxes

Annual Year Fee waived upon spending ?2,00,000 in the previous year.

Below spends will not be considered for the waiver –

  • Cash advances
  • Credit Card fees or any charges
  • All EMI spends
  • Any other categories excluded as per the Bank’s internal policies

Credit Card Activation Process

HDFC Bank Credit Card holders have to activate their Credit Cards within 30 days from Card Open Date, as per ‘Master Direction – Credit and Debit Card – Issuance and Conduct Directions, 2022’ dated April 21, 2022 realized by Reserve bank of India (RBI).

In case the credit card is not activated within 30 days of card open date, grace period of 7 days will be given to activate the card with the below mentioned modes. End of 37th day card will be closed (Details: rbi.org.in/Scripts/BS_ViewMasDirections.aspx?id=12300)

Modes for Card Activation:

By setting Credit Card PIN:

  • Through Credit Card usage - Use your Credit Card for at least 1 Online or POS transactions to keep your Credit Card active. 
  • Through MyCards - Login to mycards.hdfc.bank.in > Choose Add -Credit Card > Enter the last 4 digits of your new credit card > Select Set PIN > input your desired 4 digit PIN Through ATM – Card holders can set their 4-digit Credit Card PIN at HDFC BANK ATM with green PIN shared to the registered Mobile No.
  • Through IVR – Card holders can set their 4-digit Credit Card PIN by calling IVR No. 1860 266 0333. Upon calling the IVR please input your card number, validate through OTP and set your preferred PIN.
  • Through NetBanking – Log in to our Net Banking and visit Cards. Choose Change PIN and set your preferred PIN (available only for customers holding savings/salary/current accounts)

Enabling your online, contactless and international transactions:

  • Through Whatsapp Banking – Please save the number 7070022222 and send a message "Manage My Credit Card" to enable. Alternatively, you can click here.
  • Through Eva – To interact with Eva, please click here and choose your preferred transactions to enable.

Reward Points Redemption & Validity

Customers can redeem their reward points in two ways –

  • As cashback in the statement against their outstanding credit card balance through HDFC Bank Netbanking portal.
  • Towards a wide range of offerings on HDFC Bank SmartBuy platform.

Redemption value

  • 1 Reward Point is equivalent to Re.1 when redeemed as cashback against statement credit
  • 1 Reward Point is equivalent to Re.0.3 of SmartBuy (Flights/Hotels, Airmiles & Product Catalogue).

Please Note -

  • The minimum Reward Point balance required for redemption against the statement balance is 500 Reward Points.
  • Unredeemed Reward Points will expire/lapse after 2 years from the date of accumulation.
  • Maximum cashback redemption of Rs 7,500 per calendar month.
  • If the cardholder opts for redemption as Cashback against statement, there will be no redemption fee levied.

Additional Features

  • Interest-free Credit Period - Get up to 50 days of interest-free credit from the date of purchase. (subject to submission of the charge by the merchant)
  • Zero Cost Card Liability - Available on any fraudulent transactions made on your Credit Card if reported immediately to HDFC Bank’s 24-hour Call Centre.

Most Important Terms and Conditions

  • The Most Important Terms and Conditions for each of our banking offerings features all the specific terms and conditions that govern their use. You must go through it thoroughly to fully understand the terms and conditions applicable to any banking product you choose.
  • Click here for the card member agreement
  • Click here for the Product FAQs - PhonePe Ultimo FAQs
  • Click here for the Reward Points T&Cs
  • Click here for the Lounge Benefit T&Cs
